name: OrganizationAffectedEntitiesErrorItem
description: Error information returned when a DescribeAffectedEntitiesForOrganization operation can't find or process a specific entity.

allOf.description: The 12-digit Amazon Web Services account numbers that contains the affected entities.

The unique identifier for the event. The event ARN has the arn:aws:health:event-region::event/SERVICE/EVENT_TYPE_CODE/EVENT_TYPE_PLUS_ID format.

For example, an event ARN might look like the following:

arn:aws:health:us-east-1::event/EC2/EC2_INSTANCE_RETIREMENT_SCHEDULED/EC2_INSTANCE_RETIREMENT_SCHEDULED_ABC123-DEF456
The unique identifier for the event type. The format is AWS_SERVICE_DESCRIPTION. For example, AWS_EC2_SYSTEM_MAINTENANCE_EVENT.
